---
name: Public packaging / redaction task
about: Prepare a DevPlan-derived feature, doc, screenshot, or demo for public-safe release
labels: public-packaging
---

## What should become public?

Describe the feature, doc, screenshot, demo, or evidence slice.

## Why does it matter?

Who benefits from this becoming public?

## Redaction checklist

- [ ] no app IDs, open IDs, chat IDs, or message IDs
- [ ] no QR onboarding artifacts
- [ ] no private workspace paths
- [ ] no internal document URLs
- [ ] no raw live integration logs
- [ ] no payment screenshots or personal identifiers

## Publish shape

- [ ] README update
- [ ] public doc
- [ ] fake-data screenshot
- [ ] short video / GIF
- [ ] issue comment / roadmap update

## Extra context

Link related local notes or public docs without pasting private raw evidence.
